# Code of Conduct

Be respectful and inclusive. Harassment and discrimination are not tolerated.

## Reporting

Report unacceptable behavior by emailing security@kuest.com with the subject "Code of Conduct report". Include what happened, where it happened, who was involved, and any relevant links or screenshots.

## Enforcement

Project maintainers will review reports privately, may ask for follow-up information, and will take action they consider appropriate. Actions may include warnings, removing comments or contributions, temporary participation limits, or permanent removal from project spaces.
